case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1113 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.5012/2021 (Ex.A) 2. For hearing of main case 06.03.2025 None present for the petitioners nor any intimation is received. This petition was filed in the year, 2021 since then no efforts have been made by the petitioners or their Counsel to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge ARBROHI
